/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/server_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/resp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/aof.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/sharded_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kvserver.dir/src/store.cpp.o -o kvserver
